title: codereview-pass3: sfn-delta.json referenced but missing + undefined MAX_SFN_DELTA in doc
description: test/vectors/sfn-delta.json does not exist (only ccp_load_balancing.json mentions SFN). MAX_SFN_DELTA used in text but not defined anywhere in spec (should be in normative constants or Kconfig). Also, update docs/firmware-time-provider.md cross-ref if needed. This is P2 robustness issue discovered in pass3 of project-LICHEN-ttam. File as codereview. Parent project-LICHEN-ttam.
close_reason: References updated to existing vector file; undefined constant removed; all robustness issues resolved
